offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 premium audits/month, time-consuming manual preparation causes delayed client reporting. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Time-consuming manual preparation of audit reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in forums for insurance broker tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Offer one-click export of simple reports
